assert_OnlyBackendDiffers.condition:
dag_state = "ready" implies
        (and backend_used in {"file", "postgres"}
         and last_in_memory_op in
                {"none", "add_node", "add_edge", "query_relevant",
                 "register_gwt", "register_requirement",
                 "merge_registered_nodes"})
